title: Design MMSG v1
content: Design a minimal message protocol to coordinate across separate UIs via copy/paste. The header must be preserved and include ids, addressing, and parents.

title: Re: Design MMSG v1
content:
Here is my proposed minimal protocol:
- Use fixed markers for header/body/end.
- Require models to preserve the header and change only mid/from/to/parents/type.
- Keep a single conversation id (cid) across the run.
- Include a short subject and comma-separated parent mids for merges.
